scripts.check: pnpm run lint && pnpm run typecheck
scripts.test: pnpm run test:today && pnpm run test:trips && pnpm run test:loads && pnpm run test:finance && pnpm run test:driver && pnpm run test:capabilities && pnpm run test:navigation && pnpm run test:dispatch
scripts.test:dispatch: node --import tsx components/dispatch/dispatch-grid-contract.test.ts && node --import tsx components/dispatch/trip-grid-contract.test.ts && node --import tsx components/dispatch/timeline-utils.test.ts
scripts.test:trips: node --import tsx app/trips/settlement-visibility.test.ts && node --import tsx app/trips/trip-load-grouping.test.ts && node --import tsx app/trips/trip-loads-panel-contract.test.ts && node --import tsx app/trips/trip-cockpit-layout.test.ts
scripts.test:today: node --import tsx app/today/priority-stack.test.ts && node --import tsx app/today/activity-view.test.ts && node --import tsx app/today/activity-contract.test.ts
